features.name: always_comb block with simple combinational assignment
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block containing a simple combinational assignment with bitwise OR operator

features.name: verilator coverage line trace variable naming
features.description: Code should include a coverage line trace variable with Verilator's internal naming pattern vlCoverageLineTrace_*

features.name: module with input and output logic ports
features.description: Code should include a module with input logic ports and output logic port used with always_comb
